nodes.label: npx concurrently -c \"#93c5fd,#c4b5fd,#fb7185,#fdba74\" \"php artisan serve\" \"php artisan queue:listen --tries=1 --timeout=0\" \"php artisan pail --timeout=0\" \"npm run dev\" --names=server,queue,logs,vite --kill-others
nodes.norm_label: npx concurrently -c \"#93c5fd,#c4b5fd,#fb7185,#fdba74\" \"php artisan serve\" \"php artisan queue:listen --tries=1 --timeout=0\" \"php artisan pail --timeout=0\" \"npm run dev\" --names=server,queue,logs,vite --kill-others

nodes.label: Modal Conversion Pattern (inline CRUD modals)
nodes.rationale: Convert per-page create/edit views into inline modals on the index page for a faster modal-only UX; create.blade.php and edit.blade.php are kept as fallback single-page forms.

nodes.label: Shared form-inline.blade.php Partial Pattern
nodes.rationale: A single form partial handles both create and update by branching on whether the model is null (POST store vs PATCH update), avoiding duplicated form markup between create and edit views.

nodes.label: SweetAlert2
nodes.rationale: Adopted (via CDN) to replace basic JavaScript confirm() dialogs with styled, animated, keyboard-accessible delete confirmations.

nodes.label: Mobile-First Responsive Design
nodes.rationale: Mobile-first approach chosen so the app works from 320px phones up to desktops, with touch-friendly targets (min 44px) and a collapsible sidebar on mobile.

nodes.label: Modal Markup Pattern (fade + scale, backdrop, ESC close)
nodes.norm_label: modal markup pattern (fade + scale, backdrop, esc close)

nodes.label: Modern Table Markup Pattern (rounded-2xl container, empty state)
nodes.norm_label: modern table markup pattern (rounded-2xl container, empty state)

nodes.label: Modal-Based Forms
nodes.rationale: Create/edit forms appear in modals instead of separate pages to keep users in context, with fade/scale animations, backdrop-click and ESC to close.
